final:
// // This module filters packets based on the source and destination IP addresses.
// It allows packets only if the source IP is not in the range 192.168.1.0 to 192.168.1.255
// and the destination IP is not in the range 10.0.0.0 to 10.0.0.255.
module packet_filter (
    input [15:0] src_ip,
    input [15:0] dest_ip,
    output reg allowed
);

always @(*) begin
    if ((src_ip >= 16'hC0A80100 && src_ip <= 16'hC0A801FF) && 
        (dest_ip >= 16'h0A000000 && dest_ip <= 16'h0A0000FF)) begin
        allowed = 1'b1; // Packet allowed
    end else begin
        allowed = 1'b0; // Packet blocked
    end
end

endmodule
